home.heroHeadline: Paper packaging that carries your brand further
home.heroLead: Castle Packaging manufactures kraft, recycled and virgin paper bags, paper covers, paper cups and paper tissues — with custom printing available on every product.
home.feature1Text: We make paper bags, covers, cups and tissues in-house, so lead times and pricing stay in our control.
home.feature2Text: Add your logo and branding to paper bags, covers, cups or tissues — for retail, food service or corporate gifting.
home.feature3Text: Choose the material that fits your product and sustainability goals, from recycled kraft to virgin cellulose fibre.
home.ctaHeadline: Have a custom order in mind?
home.ctaText: Tell us your product, quantity and printing requirements — we'll get back with a quote.

about.whoWeAreText: Castle Packaging manufactures paper bags, paper covers, paper cups and paper tissues for businesses that need reliable supply and consistent quality — with custom printing available across the entire range.
about.manufactureText: Paper bags in kraft, recycled and virgin material; paper covers; paper cups; and paper tissues across semi soft, soft and virgin cellulose fibre grades. Every product can be custom printed with your branding.
about.serveText: Retailers, food and beverage businesses, distributors and brands across Bengaluru and beyond who need paper packaging in bulk, with or without custom printing.
about.missionText: To manufacture reliable, high-quality paper packaging — bags, covers, cups and tissues — that gives businesses a genuinely sustainable, brand-ready alternative to plastic, backed by consistent supply and on-time delivery.
about.visionText: To be Bengaluru's most trusted name in paper packaging — known for quality, dependability, and a genuine commitment to sustainable manufacturing as demand for eco-friendly packaging keeps growing.
about.value1Text: We offer recycled and kraft options alongside virgin material, so you can choose what fits your product and your sustainability goals.
about.value2Text: Custom printing is available on every product we make, so your packaging can carry your logo and branding, not just your product.
about.value3Text: As manufacturers, we work directly with you on specification, quantity and timelines, rather than routing your order through a reseller.

quote.headline: Request a Quote
quote.subtext: Tell us what you need — we'll respond with pricing and lead time.
